MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Aaron Dawson, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY.
Mary Catherine Wiederhold, Esq., appearing for Defendant PAMELA D. IRELAND.

Defendant Pamela D. Ireland's Motion to set aside default judgment entered on 10/23/2013 and Request for Entry of Default etnered on 10/18/2013 was heard this day.
Court ordered motion to set aside default judgment and Request for Entry of Default is GRANTED with leave to file Responsive Pleading by April 22, 2014.
Plaintiff agreed on the record to motion to set aside default judgment and Entry of Default Judgment.
Order signed in open court.
